description: I was always curious about how things work. Whether it was gadgets, games, or the internet, I kept asking "how" and "why". I spent most of my time exploring, breaking things, and learning by doing. That curiosity slowly turned into a deep interest in technology and creativity.

This is where everything became serious. I started diving into web design, development, and cybersecurity. Instead of just learning, I started building - real projects, real websites, and solving real problems. I explored modern technologies, improved my skills daily, and began working with clients, turning my passion into something impactful.

Today, I’m a developer, designer, and founder of Luno Tech. I build modern, interactive digital experiences and continuously push my limits with new technologies. From creating advanced web projects to working on cybersecurity tools like VulnScan, I focus on innovation, quality, and real-world impact. And this is just the beginning.
